---
# DevOps User Profile — Auto-generated by /init profile
# This is a SAMPLE showing what a configured profile looks like.
# The real profile lives at: ~/.claude/devops.md
# All values below are EXAMPLES — /init profile replaces them with real data from your Azure DevOps org.

lastRefresh: "2026-01-15"
schemaVersion: "6.2.0"

identity:
  displayName: "Jane Smith"
  email: "jane@example.com"
  guid: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
  uniqueName: "jane@example.com"

role: "developer"
team: "Engineering Team"
defaultProject: "My Project"

preferences:
  taskPrefix: "[Dev]"
  notifyOnAssignment: true
  autoLogTimeOnCompletion: true
  sprintBoard: "current"

taskTemplates:
  - name: "[Dev]"
    description: "Backend/Full-Stack development"
    keywords: ["api", "endpoint", "database", "backend"]
  - name: "[Front]"
    description: "Frontend development"
    keywords: ["ui", "component", "css", "frontend"]
  - name: "[QC Bug Fixing]"
    description: "QA - Bug fixing and verification"
    keywords: ["fix", "bug", "patch", "debug"]
  - name: "[QC Test Execution]"
    description: "QA - Test case execution"
    keywords: ["test", "execute", "test case", "regression"]
  - name: "[IMP]"
    description: "Implementation, deployment"
    keywords: ["deploy", "config", "setup", "migration"]

statePermissions:
  Task:
    allowed: ["To Do -> In Progress", "In Progress -> Done"]
    blocked: ["Done -> Closed"]
    blockedMessage: "Only PM/Lead can close Tasks."
  Bug:
    allowed: ["Approved -> In Progress", "In Progress -> Resolved", "Return -> In Progress", "Committed -> In Progress"]
    blocked: ["New -> Approved", "Resolved -> Done", "Resolved -> Return", "Done -> Closed"]
    blockedMessage: "QA approves/verifies Bugs. PM closes."
  ProductBacklogItem:
    allowed: ["Committed -> In Progress", "In Progress -> Ready For QC", "Return -> In Progress"]
    blocked: ["New -> Approved", "Approved -> Committed", "Ready For QC -> Done", "Ready For QC -> Return"]
    blockedMessage: "PM approves PBIs. QA verifies Ready For QC -> Done."
  Enhancement:
    allowed: ["New -> Committed", "Committed -> Done", "Return -> Committed"]
    blocked: ["Done -> Closed", "Committed -> Return"]
    blockedMessage: "QA can return Enhancements. PM closes."

projects:
  - name: "My Project"
    team: "Engineering Team"
    repos: ["project-api", "project-web"]
  - name: "Second Project"
    team: "Platform Team"
    repos: ["platform-core"]

teamMembers:
  - name: "Jane Smith"
    email: "jane@example.com"
    guid: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
    aliases: ["jane", "smith", "js"]
    role: "developer"
  - name: "Bob Johnson"
    email: "bob@example.com"
    guid: "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f23456789012"
    aliases: ["bob", "johnson", "bj"]
    role: "frontend"
  - name: "Alice Chen"
    email: "alice@example.com"
    guid: "c3d4e5f6-a7b8-9012-cdef-345678901234"
    aliases: ["alice", "chen", "ac"]
    role: "qa"
  - name: "David Lee"
    email: "david@example.com"
    guid: "d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-defa-456789012345"
    aliases: ["david", "lee", "dl"]
    role: "pm"
---

# DevOps User Profile

## My Identity
- **Name**: Jane Smith
- **Email**: jane@example.com
- **Role**: Developer (Backend/Full-Stack)
- **Default Project**: My Project
- **Team**: Engineering Team
- **Task Prefix**: [Dev]

## My Projects

| Project | Role | Team | Repos |
|---------|------|------|-------|
| My Project | developer | Engineering Team | project-api, project-web |
| Second Project | developer | Platform Team | platform-core |

## Team Members

| Name | Email | Aliases | Role |
|------|-------|---------|------|
| Jane Smith | jane@example.com | jane, smith, js | developer |
| Bob Johnson | bob@example.com | bob, johnson, bj | frontend |
| Alice Chen | alice@example.com | alice, chen, ac | qa |
| David Lee | david@example.com | david, lee, dl | pm |

## Quick Reference
- **Assign to me**: Use alias "jane" or "me"
- **Mention @bob**: Resolves to GUID b2c3d4e5-...
- **Switch project**: "switch to Second Project"
- **My tasks**: Queries My Project by default
